mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (email, password, last_name, first_name, last_name_kana, first_name_kana, phone, role) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{lastName}, #{firstName}, #{lastNameKana}, #{firstNameKana}, #{phone}, 'ROLE_USER')
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, last_name, first_name, last_name_kana, first_name_kana, phone, role, esg_point, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM members WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, email, password, last_name, first_name, last_name_kana, first_name_kana, phone, role, esg_point, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at FROM members WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET last_name = #{lastName}, first_name = #{firstName}, last_name_kana = #{lastNameKana}, first_name_kana = #{firstNameKana}, phone = #{phone}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE members SET password = #{password}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (email, password, last_name, first_name, last_name_kana, first_name_kana, phone, role) VALUES (#{email}, #{password}, #{lastName}, #{firstName}, #{lastNameKana}, #{firstNameKana}, #{phone}, 'ROLE_OWNER')
mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS orderId, s.name AS storeName, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.pickup_code AS pickupCode, o.order_status AS orderStatus, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%H:%i') AS orderTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items WHERE order_id = o.id) AS itemCount, (SELECT i.name FROM order_items oi JOIN items i ON oi.item_id = i.id WHERE oi.order_id = o.id ORDER BY oi.id ASC LIMIT 1) AS mainItemName, (SELECT ii.image_url FROM order_items oi JOIN item_images ii ON oi.item_id = ii.item_id WHERE oi.order_id = o.id ORDER BY oi.id ASC, ii.sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) AS imageUrl FROM orders o JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.id WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} AND o.order_status = 'PAYMENT_COMPLETED' AND DATE(o.created_at) = CURDATE() ORDER BY o.created_at DESC

SELECT o.id AS orderId, s.name AS storeName, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.pickup_code AS pickupCode, o.order_status AS orderStatus, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS orderTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_items WHERE order_id = o.id) AS itemCount, (SELECT i.name FROM order_items oi JOIN items i ON oi.item_id = i.id WHERE oi.order_id = o.id ORDER BY oi.id ASC LIMIT 1) AS mainItemName, (SELECT ii.image_url FROM order_items oi JOIN item_images ii ON oi.item_id = ii.item_id WHERE oi.order_id = o.id ORDER BY oi.id ASC, ii.sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) AS imageUrl FROM orders o JOIN stores s ON o.store_id = s.id WHERE o.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
